cards.text:
**Your Portfolio Summary**

Total value: **$25.35**

**Holdings:**
- OKB: 0.236 tokens (**$19.72, 77.8%**) — your core position
- USDT: 4.41 (**$4.41, 17.4%**) — stablecoin buffer
- USD₮0: 0.995 (**$0.99, 3.9%**)
- WOKB: 0.003 (**$0.24, 0.9%**)
- stOKB: 918.00 (**$0.00, 0.0%**) — zero current value
- ST, BULL, OBS: 5.00 each (**$0.00, 0.0%**) — speculative holdings with no liquidity

**⚠️ CRITICAL DIVERSIFICATION WARNING**

You are **77.8% concentrated in OKB alone**. This is extreme single-asset risk:
- If OKB drops 10%, your portfolio loses **$1.97 (7.8% overall)**
- If OKB drops 20%, you lose **$3.94 (15.6% overall)**
- You have minimal downside protection — only $4.41 stablecoin (17.4%)

Your speculative holdings (ST, BULL, OBS, stOKB) are currently worth $0, so they don't offset the concentration.

**Immediate Action: Rebalance**

Consider rotating **$10 USDT into WETH** (your only major asset with growth potential outside OKB). This would:
- Reduce OKB concentration to ~68%
- Add exposure to Ethereum momentum (+4.71% 24h)
- Still maintain your OKB upside if it rallies

The **OKB/USDT pool (1.62% APR / $56.70M TVL)** is available if you want to earn yield on your core position, but **fix the concentration first** — diversification is more valuable than an extra 1.62% APR on concentrated risk.

cards.advice: Your portfolio is **77.8% OKB — dangerously concentrated**. Rebalance immediately: rotate $10–15 of your $4.41 USDT into WETH or other non-OKB assets to bring OKB below 60%. Your speculative tokens (ST, BULL, OBS) are worthless; consider dumping them for gas savings. Keep your stablecoin buffer above 25% for dry powder.
